controls.title: Logical Access Controls
controls.rationale: Access to logical information assets must be restricted to authorized users
controls.recommendation: Implement identity management with MFA and privilege access management

controls.title: Prior to Issuance/Reissuance of Access
controls.rationale: Validate authorization before granting access
controls.recommendation: Implement approval workflows for access grants with business justification

controls.title: Removal or Modification of Access
controls.rationale: Timely removal of access when roles change or employment ends
controls.recommendation: Automate access removal within 24 hours of termination

controls.title: Change Management
controls.rationale: Systems changes must be authorized and documented
controls.recommendation: Require approval for all production changes with implementation records

controls.title: Security Training
controls.rationale: Personnel must understand their security responsibilities
controls.recommendation: Provide annual security training to all personnel

controls.title: System Availability Objectives
controls.rationale: Define and monitor system availability requirements
controls.recommendation: Document SLAs and monitor uptime metrics continuously

controls.title: Availability Threats and Risks
controls.rationale: Identify risks to system availability
controls.recommendation: Conduct annual risk assessments for availability threats

controls.title: Confidentiality Objectives
controls.rationale: Define and maintain confidentiality controls
controls.recommendation: Implement encryption for all sensitive data at rest and in transit

controls.title: Confidentiality Boundaries
controls.rationale: Prevent unauthorized access to confidential data
controls.recommendation: Implement network segmentation and access restrictions

controls.title: Processing Integrity Objectives
controls.rationale: Ensure accurate and complete processing of data
controls.recommendation: Implement validation and error detection mechanisms

controls.title: Identifiable Personal Information
controls.rationale: Protect personally identifiable information
controls.recommendation: Implement data classification and protection controls

controls.title: Logical Access Restriction
controls.rationale: Restrict access to information systems by user, transaction type, and time
controls.recommendation: Apply least privilege principles with privileged access management

controls.title: Monitoring and Alerting
controls.rationale: Monitor and alert on security events
controls.recommendation: Configure alerts for unauthorized access attempts and anomalies

controls.title: Infrastructure Maintenance
controls.rationale: Maintain secure infrastructure configurations
controls.recommendation: Apply patches and updates within defined maintenance windows

controls.title: Sensitive Access Logging
controls.rationale: Log and review access to sensitive systems
controls.recommendation: Enable comprehensive audit logging for all privileged access

controls.title: Encryption of Sensitive Data
controls.rationale: Protect sensitive data through encryption
controls.recommendation: Encrypt all sensitive data using managed keys with access controls

controls.title: Access Credentials
controls.rationale: Secure storage and handling of access credentials
controls.recommendation: Implement MFA, credential vaults, and password policies

controls.title: Detection of Anomalies and Irregularities
controls.rationale: Detect security anomalies and investigate irregularities
controls.recommendation: Implement threat detection with behavioral analysis

controls.title: Operational Incident Response
controls.rationale: Respond effectively to security incidents
controls.recommendation: Document and test incident response procedures quarterly

controls.title: Governance Oversight
controls.rationale: Maintain governance over security and controls
controls.recommendation: Establish governance committees and conduct periodic compliance reviews

controls.title: AI Services Access Controls
controls.rationale: AI accounts must enforce network isolation and managed identity auth.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access, disable local auth, enable CMK on AI accounts.

controls.title: ML Workspace Network Controls
controls.rationale: ML workspaces must use private endpoints and disable public access.
controls.recommendation: Disable public network access. Configure private endpoints.

controls.title: AI Deployment Monitoring
controls.rationale: AI deployments must have content filtering and rate limits for responsible AI.
controls.recommendation: Assign content filter policies and configure rate limits.

controls.title: Resource Group Classification
controls.rationale: Resource groups must be tagged for asset classification.
controls.recommendation: Apply mandatory tags to all resource groups.

controls.title: Storage Account Data Integrity
controls.rationale: Storage accounts must enforce encryption, soft delete, and TLS 1.2.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS-only, soft delete, TLS 1.2, and configure firewall.

controls.title: Container Registry Access Control
controls.rationale: Container registries must disable admin access and use content trust.
controls.recommendation: Disable admin user. Enable content trust. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: Container App Communication Security
controls.rationale: Container Apps must enforce HTTPS ingress.
controls.recommendation: Disable insecure connections. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Cosmos DB Data Protection
controls.rationale: Cosmos DB must disable local auth and use CMK encryption.
controls.recommendation: Disable local auth. Enable CMK. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: Database Server Availability
controls.rationale: Database servers must have HA and geo-redundant backups.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access. Enable HA. Enable geo-redundant backup.

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF Monitoring
controls.rationale: Application Gateways must enable WAF in Prevention mode.
controls.recommendation: Enable WAF. Set Prevention mode. Configure TLS 1.2.

controls.title: API Management Secure Communication
controls.rationale: APIM must disable legacy TLS and use VNet integration.
controls.recommendation: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1. Configure VNet. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Storage Container Logical Access
controls.rationale: Storage containers must not allow anonymous access.
controls.recommendation: Set all containers to Private. Configure lifecycle and immutability policies.

controls.title: SQL Server Threat Detection and Monitoring
controls.rationale: SQL Servers must enable ATP and per-database auditing.
controls.recommendation: Enable ATP and vulnerability assessment. Verify per-database auditing.

controls.title: Web Application Access Restrictions
controls.rationale: Web Apps must enable authentication and restrict access.
controls.recommendation: Enable App Service Auth. Restrict CORS. Configure IP restrictions.

controls.title: Database Server Audit Configuration
controls.rationale: Database servers must enforce secure transport and audit logging.
controls.recommendation: Enable require_secure_transport. Enable log_checkpoints and audit logging.

controls.title: Container Registry Change Management
controls.rationale: ACR repositories must enforce tag immutability.
controls.recommendation: Enable tag immutability. Clean up stale repositories.

controls.title: Incident Detection
controls.rationale: SOC 2 requires procedures to detect security incidents.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender for Cloud and configure alert rules.

controls.title: Incident Response and Notification
controls.rationale: SOC 2 requires incident notification procedures.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups with email and SMS receivers.

controls.title: Security Contact and Triage
controls.rationale: Security contacts must be configured for incident triage.
controls.recommendation: Configure security contacts with alert notifications.

controls.title: Incident Investigation Readiness
controls.rationale: SOC 2 requires investigation capability for security events.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Log Analytics and configure diagnostic settings.

controls.title: Change Control Policies
controls.rationale: SOC 2 requires formal change management procedures.
controls.recommendation: Assign Azure policies with deny effects for unauthorized changes.

controls.title: Change Tracking and Monitoring
controls.rationale: Configuration changes must be tracked and auditable.
controls.recommendation: Ensure activity logs capture Write and Delete events.

controls.title: Backup and Recovery
controls.rationale: SOC 2 Availability criteria requires backup and recovery capabilities.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Recovery Services vaults with soft delete.

controls.title: System Availability and Redundancy
controls.rationale: SOC 2 requires geo-redundant storage for availability.
controls.recommendation: Use GRS/RA-GRS replication for critical storage.

controls.title: Asset Inventory Management
controls.rationale: SOC 2 requires identification and management of system assets.
controls.recommendation: Maintain a comprehensive cloud asset inventory.

controls.title: Application Inventory
controls.rationale: SOC 2 requires inventory of authorized software and applications.
controls.recommendation: Review app registrations and ensure service principal ownership.

controls.title: Session Termination
controls.rationale: SOC 2 requires session management and automatic termination.
controls.recommendation: Configure sign-in frequency and browser session controls.
